arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Aston Villa were showing interest in Fenerbahce youngster Yusuf Akçiçek. The Premier League side have already looked to Turkey in recent months following links with Kasimpasa defender Yasin Ozcan. arts.ttl: Real Madrid target €100m Jhon Duran: Aston Villa already know his replacement
arts.sum: Real Madrid are the latest club to raise an interest in Aston Villa attacker Jhon Duran, who has had a €100 million price tag put on his head this January. Real Madrid target €100m Jhon Duran: Aston Villa already know his replacement

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'target Chelsea's Enzo Fernandez with shock swap deal' - as they prepare to 'offer star' who was BOOED by fans recently
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti has come under pressure for an underwhelming Champions League campaign and a 5-2 thrashing by Barcelona in the Spanish Super Cup earlier this month.

arts.ttl: Valladolid vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid ’s visit to Valladolid should be a manageable one, given that Pucela are sitting last in the table and fighting to avoid relegation. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Asencio, Rudiger, Fran Garcia, Tchouameni, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid claims around Aston Villa player show things are getting a little silly
arts.sum: Real Madrid have joined Paris Saint-Germain and Al-Nassr in the chase for Aston Villa star Jhon Durán. That’s according to Foot Mercato, who have been covering the striker over the past week or so. They state Real Madrid are ‘hot’ for the Aston Villa player, who is on the agenda of PSG and Al-Nassr. arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for LaLiga match against Valladolid
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Saturday’s away match against Valladolid in LaLiga. No significant news on Real Madrid’s front other than Lucas Vazquez’s return to the squad list.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Real Valladolid: La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid will be without Vinícius Júnior when they take on last-place Real Valladolid in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Decisions, decisions: Ancelotti’s Real Madrid choices for latest LaLiga test
arts.sum: Courtois; Lucas Vázquez, Asencio, Rüdiger, Fran García; Ceballos or Tchouaméni, Valverde; Brahim, Bellingham, Rodrygo; Mbappé. The likely defensive lineup will feature Lucas Vázquez, Raúl Asencio - who is becoming more dependable in central defense and drawing comparisons to Nacho - Rüdiger, and Fran García, who is expected to replace Ferland Mendy after the latter started in the Champions League.
